creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
German (de) <https://docs.freebsd.org/de/books/handbook/x11/#x-config-video-cards-ports> looked partly wrong, at a glance: 

* i915kms, radeonkms, amdgpu, intel, radeon

English (en) <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/x11/#x-config-video-cards-ports> is similarly ambiguous: 

* each of the five words is a driver name

* the array of subheadings, in and around this area, does not convey 
  a sense of why (for example) the radeonkms name might be wrong in 
  some situations.
